mnemonics.title: OWASP Mobile Top 10 Categories
mnemonics.content:
M1: Improper Platform Usage - Mindful Platform Use
M2: Insecure Data Storage - Data Defense Strategy
M3: Insecure Communication - Communication Care
M4: Insecure Authentication - Authentication Assurance
M5: Insufficient Cryptography - Crypto Confidence
M6: Insecure Authorization - Authorization Accuracy
M7: Client Code Quality - Quality Code Quest
M8: Code Tampering - Tampering Protection
M9: Reverse Engineering - Reverse Resistance
M10: Extraneous Functionality - Functionality Focus
